arts.ttl: Sheffield United vs Cardiff City – Preview
arts.sum: Relegation strugglers Cardiff City will head to Bramall Lane on Good Friday to face a Sheffield United side that have lost three games in a row. The Blades have all but chucked their automatic promotion hopes away by losing to Oxford United, Millwall and Plymouth Argyle last week. Last week highlighted United’s glaring weakness; despite […] The post Sheffield United vs Cardiff City – Preview appeared first on Sheff United Way.
By Train: From Cardiff Central, the journey to Sheffield will take approximately four hours. From Sheffield Station, Bramall Lane is approximately 15 minutes away on foot.

arts.ttl: Cardiff fans hit back at Riza 'clueless' comments
arts.sum: Cardiff City manager Omer Riza has been called "disrespectful" for branding some of the club's fans "clueless".

arts.ttl: ‘Accepting their fate’ – Sheffield United vs Cardiff City prediction: The72
arts.sum: The72's writers offer their Sheffield United vs Cardiff City prediction ahead of the Championship clash on Friday. The post ‘Accepting their fate’ – Sheffield United vs Cardiff City prediction: The72 appeared first on The72 - Football League News.
